inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bahut tezi se bukhar ho raha hai, sir mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, dengue fever typically presents with additional symptoms

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms of dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya also presents with joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can cause general malaise, but the specific symptoms point towards dengue

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash, bleeding gums, and low-grade fever confirm dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever does not typically present with a rash or bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria presents with cyclical fevers, which is not the case here

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, pet dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The persistent weakness and abdominal pain are consistent with dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of cyclical fevers
